projects.title: E-Commerce Microservices Architecture
projects.description: Designed and deployed a decoupled API infrastructure for a multi-tenant platform, prioritizing performance and horizontal scalability.
projects.impact_snippet: Optimized database queries, reducing checkout API response time

projects.title: Flutter Cross-Platform
projects.description: Developed a mobile application game to celebrate the Khmer New Year, featuring interactive content and offline capabilities for users in low-connectivity areas.
projects.impact_snippet: Fun and engaging app that received positive feedback for its performance and user experience, especially in regions with limited internet access.

projects.title: WPF Desktop Application
projects.description: Created a lightweight desktop application for generating QR codes from URLs, and offer the ability to save generated QR codes as images for later use.
projects.impact_snippet: Provided a simple and efficient tool for users to create and manage QR codes, enhancing accessibility and usability for various applications.

info.name: KOY YOTRABOTH
info.location: Sangkat Tuek Thla, Khan Sen Sok, Phnom Penh, Cambodia
